rationale: The value 2.5 (which has a nonzero fractional part, so it is unaffected by dCBOR's D5 numeric-reduction rule in either profile) encoded as a full f64 (9 bytes) instead of the shortest width that round-trips it exactly, f16 (3 bytes, 0xf9 0x41 0x00). Well-formed, but violates shortest-float-width (P5/D2).
2.5 as f32; it round-trips exactly in f16 (0xf9 0x4100).
1.5 as f64; it round-trips exactly in f16 (0xf9 0x3e00).
-2.5 as f64; it round-trips exactly in f16 (0xf9 0xc100).
100000.5 as f64; it round-trips exactly in f32 (0xfa 0x47c35040) but not f16, so f32 is the shortest form.
-65536.5 as f64; it round-trips exactly in f32 (0xfa 0xc7800040) but not f16.
